title: Italian Options Milk Chocolate Hearts, 1 KG approx 166 Pieces, Hot Pink Foil
features: Hot Pink foiled milk chocolate hearts
Made from smooth and creamy milk chocolate with an irresistible taste, velvety texture, divine flavour and intense chocolate aroma
Contains only the finest natural ingredients
Suitable for vegetarians and gluten free
Neatly wrapped in double sided hot pink foil with a premium touch and luxury feel
Each heart weighs 6 grams and measures 3cm x 3cm x 0.7cm
Perfect for weddings, valentines day, anniversary or romantic occasions.
Ideal as table chocolates or used to fill favour boxes and gift bags
description: Product description Italian Options Milk Chocolate Hearts. Made from smooth and creamy milk chocolate with an irresistible taste, velvety texture, divine flavour and intense chocolate aroma. Contains only the finest natural ingredients. Suitable for vegetarians & gluten free. Neatly wrapped in double sided foil with a premium touch and luxury feel. Each individual chocolate heart weighs approximately 6 grams and measures 3cm x 3cm with a thickness of 0.7cm. Each kilogram box contains approximately 166 milk chocolate foiled hearts. Produced with 24 months shelf life. Chocolate foiled hearts are perfect for weddings, valentines day, anniversary or romantic occasions. Ideal as table chocolates or used as a filler inside favour boxes or gift bags. Supplied in hot pink foil. Ingredients Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Whole MILK powder, Cocoa Mass, Lactose (MILK), Whey Powder (MILK), Emulsifier: SOYA lecithin. Milk Chocolate Contains: Cocoa solids 32% minimum, milk solids 14% minimum. ALLERGEN ADVICE: see ingredients in CAPITALS. May also contain traces of nuts.
